caption: The video shows a digital screen displaying a computer terminal window with lines of server logs. The text consists of IP addresses, timestamps, and HTTP request methods, such as "GET /sageapp/ HTTP/1.1" and "GET /etc/passwd HTTP/1.1". Specific log entries include "2020-05-20 6:21:16" and references to "HTTP Server" and "logger-http server mod". A blue status bar at the bottom of the window contains the word "E-playout". The image is a repetitive sequence of four nearly identical frames, with each frame showing the same window of terminal output. There are no people, clothing, or physical settings visible; the entire scene is a capture of a software interface. The content remains static across the frames, with no changes in the text or the layout of the terminal window.
